scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter shared typecheck && pnpm --filter server typecheck && pnpm --filter client typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter shared test && pnpm --filter server test && pnpm --filter client test && pnpm run test:root
scripts.e2e:install: playwright install --with-deps chromium firefox webkit msedge
scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter client build
scripts.dev:server: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter server dev
scripts.dev:client: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter client dev
